args.help: path to the git repository to summarize (a normal checkout or a bare + worktree layout)
args.name: repo

flags.help: time window: today | yesterday | week | month | all | <YYYY-MM-DD>+<N><unit> | <refA>..<refB>
flags.name: window

flags.help: LLM synthesis backend for the prose summary: none, claude-cli, or anthropic-api (no silent fallback)
flags.name: synthesis

flags.help: model id for LLM synthesis (e.g. haiku); used only when --synthesis is claude-cli or anthropic-api
flags.name: model

flags.help: git ref to treat as the tip of history when resolving the window (defaults to HEAD)
flags.name: branch

flags.help: write the generated Markdown journal to this file instead of printing to standard output
flags.name: output

flags.help: override the directory used for the on-disk journal cache (defaults to the user cache dir)
flags.name: cache-dir

flags.help: use the on-disk journal cache; pass --no-cache to always recompute the journal from scratch
flags.name: cache

summarize.help: Extract a git repository's activity over a time window and render a Markdown journal, optionally narrated by an LLM.
summarize.name: summarize

help: Generate a Markdown journal of a git repository's activity over a time window.
name: reposummary
